name: Encore Tracker
description: Per-user Encore playback sync for Jellyfin.
overview: Connect each Jellyfin user to their own Encore account and sync watch history.

versions.changelog: Add historical watch history backfill — triggers automatically after pairing and syncs all watched movies and episodes to Encore.
Fixed connection status not persisting after navigation: added error handling to status refresh and broadened JWT claim lookup for non-admin users.
